executionHistory.summary: Created comprehensive spec.md with problem statement, outcome contract, 7 goals, API access strategy (hybrid Takeout + gkeepapi), 13 requirements, 4 actors, 6 use cases, 13 Gherkin business scenarios, competitive landscape, 6 improvement proposals, UI scenario matrix, and non-functional requirements.

Created design.md with Design Brief, architecture overview (hybrid Takeout + gkeepapi via ML sidecar), 8 component designs (keep.go, takeout.go, normalizer.go, topic_mapper.go, keep_bridge.py, ocr.py, config schema, migration 004_keep.sql), data model, 4 NATS subject contracts (keep.sync.request/response, keep.ocr.request/response), pipeline integration flow, label-to-topic mapping algorithm with fuzzy matching, error handling matrix, security constraints, observability plan, testing strategy mapped to all 13 business scenarios, and 5 alternatives considered with rationale.

Created scopes.md with 6 sequential scopes: (1) Takeout Parser & Normalizer, (2) Keep Connector Config & Registry, (3) Source Qualifiers & Processing Tiers, (4) Label-to-Topic Mapping, (5) gkeepapi Python Bridge, (6) Image OCR Pipeline. 23 Gherkin scenarios (SCN-GK-001 through SCN-GK-023) mapped to all 13 business scenarios. 93 total tests across unit/integration/e2e/regression. Full scenario-to-scope traceability table.

Hardened planning artifacts: fixed 8 issues including 4 Gherkin scenario coverage gaps, 3 traceability errors, and 1 test type misclassification. Added SCN-GK-024 through SCN-GK-027 for edge cases (modified note graph edges, trashed note archiving, min content length, corrupted cursor fallback). Final: 27 Gherkin scenarios across 6 scopes. Verdict: HARDENED.

Replaced design.md with fresh, comprehensive design grounded in verified codebase facts. Covers: Design Brief, architecture overview with ASCII diagram, 7 component designs (keep.go, takeout.go, normalizer.go, topic_mapper.go, keep_bridge.py, ocr.py, ML sidecar integration), data model with artifact storage mapping, 4 NATS subject contracts on new KEEP stream, 004_keep.sql migration (ocr_cache + keep_exports tables), full processing pipeline integration flow, label-to-topic mapping algorithm (4-stage cascade), error handling matrix with 12 failure modes, configuration schema, security constraints, observability plan, testing strategy mapped to all 13 business scenarios, 6 risks, 5 alternatives considered.

Replaced scopes.md with fresh 6-scope plan. 29 Gherkin scenarios (SCN-GK-001 through SCN-GK-029) mapped to all 13 business scenarios. 98 total tests across unit/integration/e2e. Full traceability matrix BS-001 through BS-013. Scopes: (1) Takeout Parser & Normalizer 22 unit, (2) Keep Connector Config & Registry 12u+6i+2e2e, (3) Source Qualifiers & Processing Tiers 8u+4i+1e2e, (4) Label-to-Topic Mapping 10u+6i+1e2e, (5) gkeepapi Python Bridge 8u+4i+1e2e, (6) Image OCR Pipeline 8u+4i+1e2e.

notes: Google Keep connector for passive note ingestion.
